content: Self-Refine's iterative self-feedback framework can be repurposed to ground the multi-perspective inconsistency at the core of modern LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hierarchical reflection system where self-feedback on inconsistent perspectives amplifies output quality without additional training or supervision. This system first surfaces conflicting solutions via multiple-perspective reflection, then uses iterative Self-Refine to resolve inconsistencies into a coherent, higher-quality final output.
